name: Berkeley Heights YMCA - Summit Area YMCA
description: Berkeley Heights YMCA - Summit Area YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Berkeley Heights, NJ. There are 3 indoor wood courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, locker rooms, and trainers or lessons. A membership is required to play. The courts can be reserved.

name: Brookside Park
description: Come play pickleball at Brookside Park in Scotch Plains, NJ! There are 4 outdoor asphalt and concrete courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Players have access to restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: Weber Park
description: The fence that divides the front courts from the back courts is to close to both sides.  SERVING and RETURNING from the court sides by the middle fence is not possible or safe. Running toward the fence for lobs is dangerous. All 4 courts are only suitable for drinking drills.
